chunks.page_summary: This page details the variable dimensions, flange options, and material specifications for the Rheonics SRV FPC inline viscometer and density sensor, including a technical drawing with key measurements.

key_facts: The SRV FPC sensor offers a customizable insertion length, which must be greater than 55.7 mm.
Flange and adapter specifications, including norm, size, and pressure rating, are customer-specified.
Common flange options include DIN 11851 in DN32, DN40, and DN50 sizes.
The wetted surfaces of the sensor are constructed from Material 316L.
Rheonics provides inline process solutions for density and viscosity monitoring.
The product is safeguarded by both US and International patents that are granted and pending.
